chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2150 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-09-2022 Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Legal Advisor of SIDA along with Khursheed Ahmed, Executive Engineer (Irrigation), Mirpur Division, Mirpur Mathelo. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner Sukhdev is present in person. Mr. Asif Ali Rajput, Advocate, files power on behalf of the petitioner, so also respondent No.3 files reply to the show-cause notice and compliance report; same are taken on record. Copy of the compliance report is provided to learned Counsel for the petitioner. Reply to show-cause notice is found satisfactory, hence, show-cause notice stands vacated. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, after going through the compliance report, does not press instant petition on the ground that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed; hence, the petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
